text: Competition for more Ë¹gainsËº diverts you Ë¹from AllahËº,
until you end up in Ë¹yourËº graves. <sup foot_note=1326>1326</sup>

foot_notes.1326: lit., visited the graves, since the stay in the grave is brief, followed by eternal life either in Paradise or Hell.

text: But no! You will soon come to know.
Again, no! You will soon come to know.
Indeed, if you were to know Ë¹your fateËº with certainty, Ë¹you would have acted differentlyËº.
Ë¹ButËº you will surely see the Hellfire.
Again, you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.
Then, on that Day, you will definitely be questioned about Ë¹your worldlyËº pleasures.
